data.description:
# Summary

When staff approve an exemption request, the member dashboard's exemption history renders the type as literally **"Placeholder"** instead of the real type. Reproduced locally.

# Root cause (producer/consumer gap)

`CertificationCase#accept_exemption_request` (`app/models/certification_case.rb:109`) records the `:exempt` determination with a hard-coded stub: `determination_data: { exemption_type: "placeholder" }`. The method signature is `accept_exemption_request(user)` and has no access to the approved form, so it cannot record the real type.

The consumer (`MemberDashboardCompliance#exemption_type_label`, `member_dashboard_compliance.rb:270`) does `I18n.t("exemption_types.#{key}.title", default: key.humanize)`; there is no `exemption_types.placeholder` key, so it humanizes to "Placeholder". The reasons fallback does not rescue this because the recorded reason `exemption_request_compliant` does not end in `_exempt`.

# Fix

Thread the approved form through and record its real type, matching the sibling pattern (`accept_activity_report(user, application_form)`):

1. `accept_exemption_request(user)` -> `accept_exemption_request(user, application_form)`, writing `exemption_type: application_form.exemption_type`.
2. Pass `@task.application_form` from `ReviewExemptionClaimTasksController#update` (`app/controllers/review_exemption_claim_tasks_controller.rb:8`).
3. Update the existing callers/specs (certification_case_spec, exemption_application_form_spec, certification_business_process_spec, dashboard/index view spec).

# No backfill

Verified on AWS dev: zero determinations carry the "placeholder" value (the manual approval path has produced no persisted rows). No production exists.

# Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Staff-approved exemptions record the real `exemption_type` in the determination.
- [ ] Member dashboard renders the real exemption label (en + es-US), not "Placeholder".
- [ ] Specs cover the model recording the real type and the dashboard rendering it.

# Related

Depends on / pairs with the automated-exemption 500 fix (separate ticket); both touch `certification_case.rb` determination writes and the same dashboard consumer.
data.title: Member dashboard shows "Placeholder" as exemption type for staff-approved exemptions
